text: NVIDIA Corporation operates through two primary segments: Graphics and Compute & Networking. The Graphics segment offers GeForce GPUs for gaming and PCs, GeForce NOW game streaming service, Quadro/NVIDIA RTX GPUs for enterprise workstations, and Omniverse software for 3D designs and virtual worlds. The Compute & Networking segment provides Data Center platforms and systems for AI, HPC, and accelerated computing, Mellanox networking solutions, automotive AI Cockpit, and NVIDIA AI Enterprise software. The company sells to OEMs, ODMs, system builders, cloud service providers, automotive manufacturers, and other ecosystem participants across the United States, Taiwan, China, and internationally. NVIDIA employs approximately 36,000 full-time employees and is headquartered in Santa Clara, California.
